cases.description: An ODD number of TRUE arguments (3) -> TRUE
An EVEN number of TRUE arguments (2) -> FALSE, matching docs' own example =XOR(3>0,2<9) -> FALSE
Zero TRUE arguments counts as even -> FALSE, matching docs' own example =XOR(3>12,4>6) -> FALSE
A single TRUE argument (odd count = 1) -> TRUE
Numbers in a range are coerced to logical (0=FALSE, nonzero=TRUE); here two nonzero values -> 2 TRUEs (even) -> FALSE
